name: the primitive type called yea

phase_0.boundary_condition: the kinetic phase space of the Imscribing Primitives

VINIT.justification: the state of a primitive before its kinetic character is assigned

TANCH.justification: the boundary of the phase space where all states are reachable

AFWD.justification: the forward movement of a particle or state through the lattice

AREV.justification: the microscopic reversibility inherent in untrapped diffusion

CLINK.justification: the chaining of individual steps into a continuous path

IMSCRIB.justification: the identity of the particle as it relates to its own displacement

FSPLIT.justification: the branching of a single state into multiple possible future positions

FFUSE.justification: the summation of all possible paths to recover the total probability density

EVALT.justification: the successful movement into a new region of phase space

EVALF.justification: the failure to escape the current local neighborhood

ENGAGR.justification: the state of being in multiple locations simultaneously before measurement

IFIX.justification: the permanent logging of a specific path taken through the system

phase_3.void_description: static vacuum before the introduction of kinetic energy
phase_3.true_description: active diffusion where the particle successfully explores the volume
phase_3.false_description: localized fluctuation that fails to result in net transport
phase_3.both_description: quantum-like diffusion where all paths are explored simultaneously

steps.domain_action: initialize the kinetic state of the primitive
identify the primitive as a candidate for the yea character
branch the state to test for kinetic barriers
confirm the absence of ordering traps (not 'on')
propagate the state through the unconstrained lattice
reunite the test branch with the primary kinetic identity
branch the state to test for disorder traps
reject the presence of many-body localization (not 'air')
verify that the state can return from any local fluctuation
reunite the second test branch to confirm total ergodicity
compose the verified unconstrained movements into a diffusion profile
record the 'yea' status in the permanent structural type of the crystal
seal the kinetic character within the ergodic boundary

phase_5.compiler_frontend: the Lean 4 kernel validating the KineticChar inductive type
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: stochastic message passing between adjacent lattice sites
phase_5.memory_mechanism: the structural type register within the 17,280,000-type crystal
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: the thermal bath providing the energy for stochastic transitions
phase_5.alfs_store: Core.lean defining the ordinal ordering of KineticChar

phase_6.cycle_cost: thermal energy required for a single lattice hop
phase_6.post_cycle_state: distributed state across the available phase space
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — the process is a reversible diffusion in an equilibrium system
